description_long: This lamppost features a tall, ornate cast-iron column with a decorative base and intricate scrollwork branching out near the top. It supports three lantern-style lamp heads, with the central head positioned higher and the two side heads extending outward on curved arms. The lamp heads have a classic Victorian design, each topped with a pointed finial and encased in glass panels. The scrollwork and embellishments add an elegant, historical character, making it suitable for upscale urban environments such as parks, boulevards, or historic districts. The structure appears robust and is likely anchored securely to the ground. The overall finish is dark, likely black or deep bronze, contributing to its vintage aesthetic.
description: An ornate, Victorian-style lamppost with three lantern heads, decorative scrollwork, and a robust, dark metal column.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central lamp head and the vertical column, with minimal visibility of the side arms.
description_view_1: Side view revealing all three lantern heads and the elaborate scrollwork branching from the central column.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the central lamp head prominent and side arms less visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again displaying all three lantern heads and decorative scrollwork in full detail.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Victorian lantern with pointed finials and glass panels
